# `createCaptureOutput`

Generated reference page for the `createCaptureOutput` function export.

- Import: `@kjanat/dreamcli/testkit`
- Export kind: function
- Declared in: `src/core/output/index.ts`
- Source link: [`src/core/output/index.ts:639`](https://github.com/kjanat/dreamcli/blob/master/src/core/output/index.ts#L639)

## Signatures

```ts
function createCaptureOutput(
  options?: Omit<OutputOptions, 'stdout' | 'stderr'>,
): [out: Out, captured: CapturedOutput];
```

| Parameter                                              | Type                                                  | Description                                      |
| ------------------------------------------------------ | ----------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------ |
| `options`                                              | `options?: Omit<OutputOptions, "stdout" \| "stderr">` | Optional OutputOptions (minus `stdout`/`stderr`, |
| which are wired to the capture buffers automatically). |                                                       |                                                  |

## Examples

```ts
const [out, captured] = createCaptureOutput();
out.log('hello');
out.warn('danger');
expect(captured.stdout).toEqual(['hello\n']);
expect(captured.stderr).toEqual(['danger\n']);
```
